title: chamaemelum nobile f. discoideum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile f. discoideum, also known as Chamomile, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues, including insomnia, anxiety, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chamomile include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, soothing digestive issues, and calming skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Chamomile include tea, essential oils, and capsules, which can be used to make a soothing tea, add a calming effect to bath water, or take as a dietary supplement.
